rawAssistant: A rival with ambition such as yours is always welcome to discuss the Sunken Archive. I've got my eyes fixed on claiming that top spot on the Trainer's Wall - nothing but bragging rights for me when I finally surpass everyone else in Hollowfen. The Archive, of course, holds the key to unlocking those relics and proving my strength once and for all. No holding back here; if you're as hungry for victory as I am, we can make a deal: let's see who comes out on top first.
